overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a campsite with a burning campfire in front of a large wooden plantation house. The camera slowly orbits around the fire, revealing gang members resting around the camp, with warm firelight contrasting against the dark blue night sky and illuminating the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite clearing in front of wooden house

events.description: camera begins slow clockwise rotation around the campfire

agents.ego_description: slowly rotating the camera around the campfire to survey the campsite and house

notable_agents.action: character wearing a hat sitting on a log bench facing the campfire

entered.detail: large plantation-style house with multiple lit windows and a porch
burning campfire with visible flames and embers casting orange light on wet ground
log bench seating near the edge of the clearing

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a nighttime campsite with a large two-story wooden house in the background, its windows glowing with warm light. A campfire burns brightly in the foreground, illuminating a character sitting on a log bench to the left. The camera slowly begins to pan clockwise around the fire, revealing the muddy ground reflecting the firelight.

events.description: canvas tent comes into view on the right side as camera continues rotating

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan around the campfire, revealing the tent area of the camp

entered.detail: canvas camping tent with open flaps and a lantern inside
wooden supply crate or box near the tent entrance

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow orbit around the campfire, a canvas tent appears on the right side of the frame, revealing more of the campsite layout. The wooden house shifts to the left background while the campfire remains central. Wooden crates and camping supplies become visible near the tent area, and the wet mud continues to reflect the firelight.

events.description: camera reveals an NPC lying down sleeping near the tent

agents.ego_description: completing the rotation around the campfire, focusing on the tent area and resting character

notable_agents.action: character lying on the ground sleeping or resting near the tent entrance

entered.detail: character lying on blankets or bedroll on the ground near the tent
small wooden table or nightstand with a lantern on it next to the tent

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit, focusing on the tent area where a character is lying down sleeping on the ground near the canvas tent. A small wooden table with a lantern sits beside the tent. The campfire has moved to the left background, and the large wooden house returns to the center background as the rotation completes, showing the full circle of the campsite.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, clockwise orbit around a glowing campfire that gradually reveals the full layout of a nighttime campsite set before a large wooden plantation house. It begins with the house in the background and a character resting on a log bench, while the firelight reflects off the muddy ground. As the camera continues its rotation, the house shifts to the left to make room for a canvas tent and various camping supplies, including wooden crates scattered near the fire. The scene then expands to show a sleeping character on the ground beside a small lantern-topped table before the camera completes its circle. Finally, the movement brings the large wooden house back into the center background, framing the entire camp under the dark night sky.
